title: Pale Gardens, creaking secrets.
description: Adds many new features and details to the pale forest and the creaking
body:
This modpack adds many new feasures to the new pale forests, and also to the creaking mob.

This modpack feastures:
1. Fabric API:support mod
2. mod menu:allows you to view all your mods
3. Glowing Eyeblossom: makes eyeblossoms glow
4. Pale Formations:adds many new structures to the pale forests
5. Pale Hollow:Pale Hollow adds a new biome based on what some people theorized the Pale Garden might be, before it was revealed at Minecraft Live.
6. White Pumpkins:Adds Minecraft Story Mode inspired white pumpkins that will generate in the pale garden.
7. Grafted Creaking:Adds variants to the creaking based on the wood used to spawn it.
